linting.notes: Comprehensive linter configuration with enable-all policy and specific exclusions. Also includes make fmt (go fmt + gci) and make vet (go vet).

testing.run_single_test: Not applicable - no test specs exist
env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - path to kubebuilder test binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver)
testing.notes: Only one test file exists (suite_test.go) with 0 test specs - it's just test suite setup. Tests require Kubernetes envtest infrastructure (etcd, kube-apiserver) to run. The test suite fails without these binaries even though there are no actual test cases to execute.

ci.notes: CI runs linting on all PRs and pushes to main. Image building happens on pull_request_target events. No test execution in CI - tests are not gating.

build.notes: Build requires code generation (make generate) and CRD manifests (make manifests). Default build produces bin/manager binary. Container build uses podman by default (IMAGE_BUILDER=podman).

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style - Describe/Context/It blocks, BeforeSuite/AfterSuite hooks
conventions.import_style: Dot imports allowed for Ginkgo/Gomega packages (specified in .golangci.yml revive rules)
conventions.notes: Kubernetes operator following controller-runtime/Kubebuilder patterns. Uses +kubebuilder markers for code generation.

lint_commands.notes: Runs successfully. Downloads golangci-lint v1.63.4 to ./bin/. Two warnings about linters disabled due to Go version (copyloopvar, intrange require Go 1.22+). Exit code 0.
Not validated, but same as make lint with --fix flag

test_commands.notes: Requires Kubernetes envtest infrastructure (etcd, kube-apiserver binaries). Cannot run in simple container without these dependencies. Test suite exists but has 0 test specs.
Runs but fails due to missing envtest binaries. Shows 'Will run 0 of 0 specs' - no actual test cases exist. Exit code 1 due to envtest setup failure, not test failures.

container_recipe.test_single_test: Not applicable - no test specs exist
container_recipe.notes: Tests cannot run in standard container without Kubernetes test infrastructure. The setup-envtest@latest requires Go 1.25+ (incompatible with Go 1.21). Even with compatible setup-envtest version, tests need etcd and kube-apiserver binaries which are not available in standard golang image.
